name: Dough Art (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Hot water (Instant coffee added to water gives dough a "browned" color)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until the dough is formed.
2. Knead dough for 6 - 8 minutes.
3. Roll out the dough and cut with cookie cutters into desired shapes.
4. Place the pieces on wax paper on a glass tray.
5. Use a toothpick to make several holes in each piece to allow air to escape.
6. Microwave on high for about 2 minutes (time will vary depending on size of "cookies").
7. Allow to cool before decorating.
